name: Luuk Herssen
description:
He’s happy to use his hands.

Luuk Herssen is somewhat of a mystery, though a beloved one nonetheless. Nearly every student adores and respects him, whether for his medical expertise or advice. Staff are just the same, and though his position isn’t necessarily one of large influence, he’s become quite privy to both the official and unofficial business surrounding those he works with. Of course, he doesn’t exactly care to interfere unless the outcome of such business could affect the Academy, himself, or his beloved.

—————————
